summaries.main.py: Bot entry point. Registers commands, initializes database, starts Discord bot. NO business logic here.
summaries.config.py: Environment configuration. Loads DISCORD_TOKEN and DB credentials from .env file.
summaries.commands/start.py: !start command handler. Registers Discord user in database on first use.
summaries.commands/help.py: !help command handler. Displays list of all available commands.
summaries.commands/ask.py: !ask <query> command handler. Routes queries through AI logic engine.
summaries.commands/status.py: !status command handler. Shows bot status, guild count, and latency.
summaries.services/ai_logic.py: Core AI decision engine. Detects intent from user text, calls APIs, returns responses. This is the primary file to modify for bot behavior.
summaries.services/api_client.py: External API client. All HTTP requests go here. Uses requests library with timeout.
summaries.services/mock_data.py: Fallback mock responses when API is unavailable or intent is unclear.
summaries.models/user.py: User model with database CRUD operations. Supports Discord user auto-creation.
summaries.core/database.py: PostgreSQL connection manager. Provides get_db() context manager and table initialization.
summaries.utils/logger.py: Simple logging configuration with console handler.
summaries.requirements.txt: Python dependencies: discord.py, requests, python-dotenv, psycopg2-binary.
summaries..env.example: Environment variable template. Copy to .env and fill in values.
